case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. CHRISTINE CLEARY ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200049751) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CLEARY, CHRISTINE DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2022
